archetype: Swiss & High-Contrast (Adapted for Indian Political Context)
emotional_tone: Authoritative, Transparent, Culturally Rooted, and Action-Oriented

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Generous Spacing for Public Site (p-8 to p-12), Dense Control-Room Grid for Admin Dashboard (p-4 to p-6).
layout_and_spacing.public_site_grid: Bento Grid Mode A (The Tetris Grid). Mix col-span-4 and col-span-8 for asymmetrical, engaging content consumption.
layout_and_spacing.admin_dashboard_grid: Control Room Grid Mode B. Dense data, tight gaps (gap-4 or gap-6).
layout_and_spacing.border_radius: rounded-xl for public site sections, rounded-md for admin dashboard components.

surface_strategies.header: Glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80 border-b border-stone-200. Must remain highly legible.
surface_strategies.hero_overlay: bg-gradient-to-r from-stone-900/80 via-stone-900/50 to-transparent. Never use flat heavy black.
surface_strategies.cards: Flat background (bg-white), 1px subtle border (border-stone-200), hover state: -translate-y-1 shadow-lg shadow-blue-900/5 transition-all duration-300.

motion_and_interaction.hover_states: Buttons must shift background to a darker hue and retain high contrast text. Cards must lift slightly.

components_instructions.html_vs_shadcn: Use HTML/Tailwind pure layout for marketing sections (Hero, Features, Bento). Use Shadcn ONLY for interactive logic (Tabs, Dialogs, Select, Tables, Forms).
components_instructions.admin_dashboard: Use Shadcn components extensively for data grids, tables, and configuration forms. Use Recharts for any data visualization (e.g., grievance analytics).
components_instructions.icons: Use lucide-react (already installed). Standardize size and stroke-width (e.g., w-5 h-5 stroke-[1.5]).
components_instructions.testing: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid="hero-cta-button").

hero_image_rally.description: High energy political rally with optimistic sunset lighting.

constituency_map_background.description: Interactive map background showing regions highlighted in blue and green.

lotus_logo.description: 3D lotus logo representing the platform brand.

leader_portrait_background.description: Clean, authoritative studio background for leader profiles.

parliament_building.description: Indian parliament building for development and governance sections.

crowd_interaction.description: Crowd and rally for volunteer and community engagement sections.

pages_to_build: Public Site: Home Page (Hero, Constituency Search, Latest News/Activity)
Public Site: Constituency Details (Sub-Regions, Local Leaders, Map)
Public Site: Leader Profile (Biography, Timeline of Career, Development Works)
Public Site: Get Involved (Grievance Form, Volunteer Registration, Event Calendar)
Admin Dashboard: Profile Manager (Rich Text Bio/Timeline)
